title: Campus Story
synopsis: 해외 어학연수 첫날. 같은 반 친구 Noah와 영어로 부딪히며 캠퍼스 생활에 적응하는 이야기.

scenes.line: Hey, is this seat taken? I'm Noah.
scenes.target: No, go ahead! I'm Eunil. Nice to meet you.

scenes.line: First day too? I'm a little nervous.
scenes.target: Same here, but it'll be fun.

scenes.line: Want to be study partners?
scenes.target: Sounds great. Let's help each other.

scenes.line: Our topic is 'a place you love.' Any ideas?
scenes.target: How about my hometown, Seoul?

scenes.line: Perfect! Can you present that part?
scenes.target: Sure, I'll take that section.

scenes.line: We nailed it! Great teamwork.
scenes.target: Couldn't have done it without you.

scenes.line: The festival's tonight! Are you coming?
scenes.target: Wouldn't miss it. What's the plan?

scenes.line: Food trucks, music, the whole thing. Let's go!
scenes.target: I'm in. Let's make it a night.

scenes.line: Best semester ever, thanks to you.
scenes.target: Right back at you, my friend.

scenes.line: Big presentation tomorrow. Are you ready?
scenes.target: Almost. Can we practice together?

scenes.line: Sure! Just speak slowly and breathe.
scenes.target: Thanks, that really calms me down.

scenes.line: You've got this. I believe in you.
scenes.target: With you here, I'm not worried.

scenes.line: Finals week. Coffee or tea to survive?
scenes.target: Coffee, definitely. It's going to be a long night.

scenes.line: Let's quiz each other to stay awake.
scenes.target: Good idea. You go first.

scenes.line: We make a great study team, honestly.
scenes.target: Couldn't ask for a better partner.

scenes.line: Results are out! Did you check yours?
scenes.target: Not yet — I'm too nervous!

scenes.line: We both passed! Top of the class!
scenes.target: No way! We actually did it!

scenes.line: Celebration's on me tonight.
scenes.target: You're the best. Let's go!

scenes.line: Can you believe the program's ending?
scenes.target: It went by so fast. I'll miss this.

scenes.line: Your English is amazing now. Truly.
scenes.target: I learned so much from you too.

scenes.line: Let's not lose touch, okay?
scenes.target: Never. You're a friend for life.

scenes.line: I got a job back home. What about you?
scenes.target: That's amazing! I'm heading back to Seoul.

scenes.line: Different cities, but same friendship, right?
scenes.target: Distance won't change a thing.

scenes.line: Promise we'll meet again someday.
scenes.target: It's a promise. Until then!

scenes.line: Guess what — I'm visiting Seoul next year!
scenes.target: Seriously? I'll show you around!

scenes.line: You'll be my personal guide, deal?
scenes.target: Deal. Get ready for the best trip.

scenes.line: From classmates to lifelong friends.
scenes.target: Here's to the next chapter, together.
